title: 3lements
description: Adventure modpack with server access included!
body:
## 3lements is an adventure modpack with a focus on freedom of exploration, abundance of structures and streamlined gameplay. 
### Key features:
- **3 custom Origin Classes** that give players Wind, Water or Fire abilities
- Tons of **Villages and Structures to explore**, with unique instanced chests for every player
- **New Enemies and Bosses** - Mobs also spawn **during the day**
- **Flying Mounts** and **Aircrafts**
- **Musical Instruments** and **Painting** 
- **The Aether** and **Twilight Forest** dimensions!
- ~~- Access to the **Dedicated Server** with pregenerated LODs!~~

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/1uqHgmqWDFY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

*Trailer from the previous version of the modpack, watch in 4K*



### Notes:
- most of the lesser used keys have been unbound because there's a ton of bindings introduced by mods and some were conflicting, so please keep in mind you might have to bind some of the keys yourself.
- by default, the origin ability key should be **R**. Feel free to change it in the keybinding section, under Primary Origin Power.
- Press **T** to roll.
- Depending on your CPU and GPU specs, you might want to tweak or disable Distant Horizons and/or the shader. On first launch, it is recommended to set Distant Horizons to 128/256/512 chunks and CPU priority to max, in order to generate your LODs. Once completed you can put it back to a lower number of chunks and balanced CPU.
